model: deepseek-v4-pro sharded review with deepseek-v4-flash synthesis
scope: LFG-P6.2 Next browser-events mounted runtime/API writeback probe

blocking_findings.summary: Initial implementation claimed full browser-events migration while lifecycle timeout and cleanup scenarios were hardcoded rather than replayed through Next UI.
Package and closeout initially pointed to the Next script, which risked replacing the legacy full closeout gate with a partial probe.

changes: tools/check-closeout.mjs remains on tools/check-workbench-browser-events.mjs for full closeout validation.
check:workbench:next-browser-events was added as a separate mounted Next runtime/API writeback probe.
docs/governance/legacy-static-workbench-inventory.json and LARGE_FILE_GOVERNANCE_PLAN.md keep full browser-events migration as a deletion blocker.

non_blocking_findings.summary: The probe artifact uses status=pass after runtime assertions have already succeeded; DeepSeek judged this non-blocking.

delta_review.summary: DeepSeek confirmed the revised change no longer presents the Next probe as full closeout migration, keeps the legacy closeout gate intact, and records P6 deletion as blocked.
